description: Django models defining defect management system entities such as Defect, WorkflowStatus, FiveWhyAnalysis, CorrectiveAction, and DefectHistory.

classes.name: WorkflowStatus
classes.description: Represents the status or state of a defect in the workflow.

classes.name: Defect
classes.description: Core defect record with severity, priority, type, and related metadata.

classes.name: FiveWhyAnalysis
classes.description: Stores 5-Why analysis data linked to a specific defect.

classes.name: CorrectiveAction
classes.description: Represents corrective or preventive actions associated with a defect.

classes.name: DefectHistory
classes.description: Logs history and comments for a defect, including status changes and updates.

methods.name: __str__
methods.description: Returns string representation of the object, typically its key identifier or code.
